title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: gnome-shell-extension-dash-to-dock bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for gnome-shell-extension-dash-to-dock is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.1 Release Notes linked from the References section.
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian

fixes.description: Please backport Fedora 41 changes in gnome-shell-extension-dash-to-dock if needed (2025-02-23)

full_text:
An update for gnome-shell-extension-dash-to-dock is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.1 Release Notes linked from the References section.
